# OjaLink

> OjaLink is an all-in-one business productivity suite built for Nigerian entrepreneurs and small business owners — combining CRM, bookings, inventory, sales reporting, budgeting, and free utilities in one dashboard.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, testimonials, and pricing summary.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free Starter plan and Paid Plan details with Paystack and crypto payment options.
- [Public Booking](/book): Customer-facing page to book appointments with an OjaLink business.
- [Register](/register): Create a new OjaLink account.
- [Login](/login): Log in to an existing OjaLink account.

## Optional

- [Forgot Password](/forgot-password): Request a password reset link.
